同埋想知一啲遊覽曼徹斯特市小Tips﹖

詳情請click入https://goo.gl/wLBkmb。另歡迎各位有興趣留啲心得分享比巴打們嘅巴打，係以上嘅link度留下備註，小弟會幫手加落篇文度(記得加番自己個會員名，方便credit你!)。大家亦可以係曼po度留言，我見到嘅話亦會加番落個google doc度。如果1001開po嘅巴打覺得啱洗，歡迎將啲FAQ或者呢一段文字放係第二個comment度，方便大家查閱。覺得冇需要嘅請ignore。特別感謝【Berbatov】、【黑白灰......】、【特西】、【活華特】、【SNOOZE】、【朗隊】以及【曼聯聯盟2】之巴打提供心得。

比起邊個領隊

隊波球員技術/性格/年齡/分工結構仲重要

前線要有人負責入波，有人技術好控個波落黎/扭人引後衛，有人拉邊幫隊友走位，有人連結，有人屈遠射/屈freekick屈燒味頭鎚,有老控節奏，有嫩狗衝迫搶, etc

我地99 08 兩個短皇朝，基本上每一環都有齊

e.g. 2008
入波 - c7/tevez
技術好+扭人引後衛 - c7/nani/tevez
拉邊幫隊友走位 - rooney/park/giggs
遠射 - c7/scholes/rooney
freekick - c7
連結 - carrick/scholes

早兩三年皇馬拜仁，而家psg一樣好齊上面D元素

而家普巴朋友隊問題就係大家都太相似，大家都係鍾意上腳，make extra touch，唔鍾意幫隊友走位 ，唔鍾意幫波，唔鍾意攝前柱, 頭腦發熱嘅後生仔

現今球會賺取利潤的手法眾多，當中1個就是出售主場的冠命權，例如曼城主場獲阿提哈德航空冠名贊助，每季贊助費高達1900萬鎊，不過還比不上宿敵曼聯；根據財務估價公司道衡最新的報告，紅魔每季正在錯失2600萬鎊的冠名權收益。

不過曼聯一早已經強調無意出售奧脫福球場的冠名權，至今立場仍然維持不變。道衡又估算了其他球會的冠名權收益，車路士主場史丹福橋球場價值1800萬鎊，熱刺的白鹿徑球場則價值1550萬鎊，兩者均略高於阿仙奴酋長球場的1500萬鎊贊助費。

好在

【now.com體育】曼聯中場安達靴里拉因捲入假波案，據悉在檢控官將重開調查下，面臨監禁2年和禁止參與足球活動6年的刑罰。

曼聯球星安達靴里拉（Ander Herrera）捲入2011年一場西甲假波案，當時他代表薩拉戈薩對戰利雲特，最終協助球隊贏2:1而順利護級，利雲特方面被指受賄故意輸波。據《馬卡報》周三報道，檢控官已重新展開調查，有可能判以各人兩年監禁和禁止參加足球活動6年。涉案人多達41人之多，包括馬德里體育會球星加比，堪稱西甲史上最大型的假波案。

接近檢控官辦公室人士向《馬卡報》透露道：「如果這樣的案件都不檢控，那應該乾脆廢除有關體育法律規條。」有關審訊停止了近兩年，如今決定重新審理，很大機會把涉案人送上法院，甚至送入監獄。據悉，有關審訊最快半年後舉行。

安達靴里拉之前發表聲明否認有關指控，强調自己從未參與任何假波，也願意上庭接受審問。

自從去年夏天以3100萬英鎊的轉會費加盟曼聯之後，連迪路夫始終沒有辦法在英超聯賽中得到穩定的出場機會，據《曼徹斯特晚報》披露，由於史摩寧和鍾斯最近狀態下滑，這位瑞典國腳希望自己能夠在接下來的比賽中得到表現機會。

「我可以踢右閘，小的時候我就踢右閘。」連迪路夫在Twitter上的一個問答環節中說道。「但過去幾年我一直踢中堅，在中堅位置上我感覺最舒服，但我可以踢很多不同的位置，我是曼聯的一塊磚，哪裡需要哪裡搬，不管教練要我踢什麼位置我都願意，但我更傾向於踢中堅。」

機會係要自己爭取

2008年，19歲的山神外流歐洲加盟烏甸尼斯，意大利記者奧利奧圖向曼聯雜誌透露當年採訪山神的經歷﹕「有一次訓練後，阿歷斯駕車到市內買東西，但他竟然把鎖匙及手提電話鎖了在車上，我不知其他人會怎樣做，但他選擇跑回家。當地人看到他穿著訓練服，由市中心跑回在8公里外山上的家，紛紛打電話到報館報料。事實上他就是靠這種越野跑鍛煉身體。」他沒有透露山神為何沒有車匙仍能鎖上車門，不過據悉有部分車在拔掉車匙一段時間後，會自動鎖上車門。

至於山神現時滿身肌肉亦經過一番苦練，奧利奧圖說﹕「他第一課操練時很瘦，很多時間都留在右翼，因為禁區內的身體對抗對他太吃力了。不過球隊需要他更多出現在中路，這樣才能利用他的盤球，所以他開始健身，球隊甚至為他搭了個臨時健身室。他每天訓練後健身2小時。我記得有次季前操練時看到他滿身肌肉，感覺有多驚訝」。
鬥心黎講 山神真係冇撚得輸 佢一甩波就會成隻狗咁追番

Player ‘close’ to joining Manchester United as €20m deal is ‘practically agreed’ for summer

Lucas Sposito14th February 2018
So here we go again. Round two for Manchester United’s attempt to sign Umaro Embalo from Benfica.

It’s with quite a surprise that we’ve read the player is ‘close’ to joining the Red Devils today, according to a report from Portuguese newspaper Correio da Manhã.

The story claims talks between the clubs ‘intensified’ during the past few days and there’s a €20m agreement which is ‘practically closed’.

This would be the minimum price that Benfica will sell the 16-year-old for. Manchester United have only raised their bid because they truly believe in his potential, and want to avoid competition from several other sides who are said to be interested.

Correio da Manhã also claims the player ‘sees the Manchester United move with good eyes’, which isn’t exactly shocking information at this stage.

In case you can’t recall, the teenager was heavily linked to Manchester United in November, when newspaper Record claimed the deal was done.

That story soon disappeared, especially when RB Leipzig started talks for him.

The German side were said to be close to signing Embalo for this same amount, as the player even travelled to Germany, but some details couldn’t be agreed with his agent. Some papers claimed it was the commission, but representative Catio Baldé denied that, and left the door open for the summer transfer market.

At that time, it sounded like Manchester United would never pay such amount for a 16-year-old, but maybe after seeing that the competition was real, the club changed their mind.

Let’s just not jump the gun this time and wait for other sources to confirm it. For now, only Correio da Manhã has such info.

Fifa 18 drops Manchester United squad hint

Man Utd play at Huddersfield in the FA Cup this weekend and fans want Jose Mourinho to include another youngster in the squad.


Tahith Chong has made a superb start to his Manchester United Under-23 career and that has not gone unnoticed by EA Sports.

The 18-year-old, who only made his U23 debut against Tottenham at Old Trafford two weeks ago, has been promoted to United's first-team squad on Fifa 18.

Online gamers can now select Chong, whose squad number is listed as 53, in their United team following the latest squad download. The updated version features Alexis Sanchez at the expense of Henrikh Mkhitaryan following their January transfer window swap deal.

Chong, who scored on his first Old Trafford appearance in last season's FA Youth Cup defeat to Southampton, spent 10 months on the sidelines with a knee injury but returned for the U18s in November and has scored four times in five starts.

Although the Dutch teenager dropped back down to the table-topping U18s for their defeat to Newcastle on Saturday, he has completed 90 minutes in the U23s' last two fixtures versus Spurs and Derby, scoring against the former.

Tahith Chong has arrived on Fifa
Tahith Chong has arrived on Fifa
Chong's resurgent form and Fifa squad recognition have fuelled hope among United supporters that he could be rewarded with a matchday squad berth in Saturday's FA Cup fifth round tie at Huddersfield.

United manager Jose Mourinho gave debuts to Axel Tuanzebe and Joel Pereira in the competition last term while Angel Gomes travelled with the squad to Yeovil in the fourth round last month. The 17-year-old emerged in the 88th minute and came close to a first United goal within seconds of his arrival.

Could there be a Chong debut goal at Huddersfield?
Could there be a Chong debut goal at Huddersfield?
The U23s play at Chelsea on Friday evening and any potential squad absences could hint at first-team inclusions for the 18 at the John Smith's Stadium this weekend.

Gomes is still listed in the United Fifa squad five months after he jokingly took umbrage at his look on the game. Gomes tweeted to EA Sports' Fifa account: "Why do I look like Wilfried Bony? Hahahahahaha."

Chong's look bears little resemblance to his appearance in reality but his Fifa debut has not gone unnoticed by some United gamers...

睇馬迪就知 成日俾佢屌向前幫波

其實我地推進的方式都好差
以前費sir個陣下下分兩下邊 再黎個三角短傳
搓兩下就去到三閘線 隻翼好易做一係斬 一係俾隻閘overlap
依家下下企埋一邊死磨爛磨 分邊亦好少一腳轉邊
跟本拉唔開對面防線 人地只要跟波走已經 順利對位
真 好少大腳轉向 通常想轉向就猜過去 翼 中堅 馬迪 跟住另外一邊隻翼 咁樣轉 企晒位真係唔會有咩突破..
依啲係基本功問題啦 尤其我地對中堅係英人
基本功特差
琴晚鈀對鍠 人地係條後防線搓得仲順過我地前場
基本上冇壓力下係唔會犯錯
邊似我地史波 冇人逼都可以傳球醫院波累隊友
即使係拜利 有時都會推太大步甩下甩下咁
所以哥狗扔咁多錢都要砌條識用波既防線

市面上要有鈀 鍠咁高傅球質素的中堅，真係諗唔到
就算有 我諗亦都好難有 可以長期對抗英超的身體質素
有幾多個好似李奧咁 可以剛矛並重
史波係個腦同心理問題 經常唔集中 心急 唔夠冷靜
佢有個fit的拍擋 佢就會鬆懈左
但你俾一個垃圾係佢 隔離 佢知要一夫當關個陣
就會好集中 好勁 同埋佢可以長期唔傷 依點已經好過 其他玻璃中堅 起碼出到先
後衛真係好難再好 除非大膽 一次賣曬史波 白 Lin 再入新血

其實俾你入到識用波中堅都冇用
摩佬套波就係唔想中堅hold波唔想take risk
就算有識用波中堅都係會係咁斬

咁至少斬得靚
睇屎波扭軚傳五碼波唔睇到燥
